title: APS Story
description: A collection of Items, Badges, and perks to enhance your Cobblemon adventure!
body:
APS Story — 60+ Custom Items for Cobblemon!
APS Story is a content mod built for the APS Server, adding over 60 handcrafted items that serve as the backbone of the server's quest system, gym progression, economy, and lore.

🏅Gym Badges (30 Custom Badges)
Earn badges from APS Clan Leaders by defeating them in battle. Each badge is a unique cosmetic item representing a different gym, clan, or challenge on the server:

🎟️Raid Tickets (5 Tiers)
Take on increasingly powerful raid encounters with tiered tickets:

Tier 1 Raid Ticket — Entry-level raids
Tier 2 Raid Ticket — Intermediate challenges
Tier 3 Raid Ticket — Advanced encounters
Tier 4 Raid Ticket — Elite-tier battles
Tier 5 Raid Ticket — Legendary-difficulty raids

💰Currencies & Economy Items
A suite of unique server currencies and tradeable items to power the in-game economy:
Strange Coin, Star Piece, Park Pass, and more.

⚔️ Quest & Lore Items
Key items used as objectives, rewards, and story tokens throughout the APS questline:

Boss Crystal — Dropped from powerful boss encounters
Corrupted Drive — A mysterious data artifact tied to server lore
Ship Ash & Ship Fragment — Remnants of a lost voyage
Mysterious Egg — What could be inside?
Stuffed Fuecoco — A beloved collectible
Master Sword & Pokesword — Iconic weapons reimagined in the Cobblemon world
Poke Lasso — A unique capture tool item
